name: SmilingCritters (SpaceRidersAU)
description:
C'mon out and have yourself an adventure with Dogday the gold american cocker spaniel, Catnap the purple sleepy mute cat, Bubba bubbaphant the blue full-of-knowledge elephant, Hoppy hopscotch the green energetic rabbit, KickinChicken the fiery fighter chicken, Bobby Bearhug the most loving red bear, PickyPiggy the full-of-resources Pig and Craftycorn the blue and white unicorn full of creativity and arts.

Creator for the AU
Twitter:
@Astral_Onyx

Please do go support them. ^^
creator: Skylés Mozackt
